title: A Comprehensive Overview of Modern Machine Learning: From Theory to Practice
description_es: Una revisión comprehensiva que cubre tópicos modernos en aprendizaje automático desde perspectiva teórica y práctica.
abstract: This comprehensive overview covers modern machine learning from theoretical foundations to practical implementations, including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, deep learning, and emerging techniques.

citations.apa: Herrera, F. (2024). A Comprehensive Overview of Modern Machine Learning: From Theory to Practice. arXiv preprint arXiv:2402.xxxxx.
citations.mla: Herrera, Francisco. "A Comprehensive Overview of Modern Machine Learning: From Theory to Practice." arXiv preprint arXiv:2402.xxxxx, 2024.
